title: Warren v0.1.0: manual run path end-to-end
description:
Ship Warren v0.1.0 — the manual run path end-to-end. User can: connect canopy, add project, spawn run, watch live event tail, steer, cancel, see expertise capture round-trip. Single-user, single-host, docker compose deploy.

Out of scope (V2): scheduler, GitHub webhooks, library API exports.

Authoritative source: SPEC.md (V1 sections — see §3.1 V1 goals, §4.3 composition flow, §11.B resolved decisions).

Stack locked: Bun + TS strict, Bun.serve, bun:sqlite + Drizzle, React + Vite + shadcn/ui + Tailwind, supervisor as small Bun parent (§10.3), HttpClient from @os-eco/burrow.

Burrow dependency: shipped (commit 7926a0e on 2026-05-08); all 21 routes warren needs are live.

title: Switch @os-eco/burrow-cli dep from file:../burrow to a published semver range once burrow is on npm
description: Phase 2 (warren-c0e6) wired @os-eco/burrow-cli via a file: reference because burrow isn't published yet. When it lands on npm, flip package.json to a semver range and re-run bun install. Touch package.json + bun.lock; verify HttpClient import + type still resolves; make sure CI publish workflows don't trip on the file: dep.
